hook.text: Three billion gamers use electricity. Cloud gaming adds data centers. Gaming has a growing carbon footprint.

buildup.text: A gaming PC uses 5-10 times more energy than a console. Cloud gaming shifts energy use to massive data centers.

discovery.text: The Playing for the Planet Alliance united studios to reduce emissions. Some pledged carbon-neutral operations.

twist.text: Digital distribution eliminated plastic discs but increased server energy use. The net impact is debated.

climax.text: As gaming grows, its environmental impact grows too. Sustainability is the industry's next major challenge.

punchline.text: Three billion players. Growing energy use. Gaming must go green.

quiz.question: How does a gaming PC's energy use compare to a console?
options: A gaming PC uses 5-10 times more energy
